mission.title: thanos: Compact: Offline deduplication
mission.description: Compact: Offline deduplication. This issue affects 31+ users.

steps.title: Identify thanos feature symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your thanos deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=thanos
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors related to: Compact: Offline deduplication

steps.title: Check current resource configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant thanos resources:
```bash
kubectl get resource -A
kubectl describe resource <name> -n <namespace>
```
Currently Thanos provides dedup function in Query component, it can merge the data on the fly from Prometheus HA pairs or remote object storage.
However, the Query dedup function is not query efficien

steps.title: Apply the fix for Compact: Offline deduplication
steps.description:
As the discussion in #1014, implement a new feature in compactor which provides offline deduplication function for the data from different replicas.

The offline deduplication follow the same design with [query deduplication](https://thanos.io/components/query.md/#deduplication). The user needs to s
```yaml
| 01E4N18DW7663APZ5V0B3D3CY1 | 30-03-2020 05:30:00 | 30-03-2020 06:00:00 | 30m0s    | 39h30m0s   | 545,049    | 50,824,911     | 545,054     | 1          | false       | replica=thanos-receive-0 | 0s         | receive   |
| 01E4N18DW8A4Z0ES2GCXBFEVVH | 30-03-2020 05:30:00 | 30-03-2020 06:00:00 | 30m0s    | 39h30m0s   | 545,049    | 50,824,911     | 545,054     | 1          | false       | replica=thanos-receive-2 | 0s         | receive   |
| 01E4N18DW8AR0CRXN0F4N0F7VY | 30-03-2020 05:30:00 | 30-03-2020 06:00:00 | 30m0s    | 39h30m0s   | 545,049    | 50,824,911     | 545,054     | 1          
```

steps.title: Confirm Compact: Offline deduplication is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
The root cause is: As the discussion in #1014, implement a new feature in compactor which provides offline deduplication function for the data from different replicas.

The offline deduplication follow the same design with [query deduplication](https://thanos.io/components/query.md/#deduplication). The user needs to specify replica label by config `dedup.replica-label` before enable it, and the function uses current. This fixes the issue because it addresses the underlying problem that was causing the failure.
